creator: gmc@metro.cx
text:
Hi,

I do have a serial console hooked up to the machine. However, after 6 months i stopped expecting a reply to this bug and decided to move the machine to production with FreeBSD 9.3. I can obtain traces if needed, but I would have to schedule a maintenance window. Fortunately, Joseph seems to be able to provide the required information so i will await that.

My system is also a Tyan mainboard, the S3992.
